summary: OCB TITAN RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) System - Complete testing. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All 3 tabs working - Permission Matrix, Assign Role, Audit Log.

bugs_fixed.issue: Backend RBAC endpoints returning empty {} for user permissions
bugs_fixed.root_cause: JWT payload uses 'user_id' but RBAC code was using 'user.get("id")' - key mismatch
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed all occurrences of user.get("id") to user.get("user_id") or user.get("id") in /app/backend/routes/rbac_system.py

bugs_fixed.issue: Frontend Assign Role tab crashing with 'users.map is not a function' error
bugs_fixed.root_cause: API returns {items: [], total: n} format but frontend expected array directly
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated fetchUsers() to handle {items: []} format in /app/frontend/src/pages/settings/RBACManagement.jsx

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ROLE_RBAC for role CRUD testing (cleaned up after)

RBAC_BACKEND_APIS.GET /api/rbac/roles: PASS - Returns all 13 roles with levels
RBAC_BACKEND_APIS.GET /api/rbac/permissions/matrix/{role_i: PASS - Returns permission matrix for role
RBAC_BACKEND_APIS.GET /api/rbac/audit-logs: PASS - Get audit logs with filters

Permission Matrix Tab.Role List: PASS - Shows 13 roles (Pemilik, Administrator, Supervisor, Kasir, Keuangan, Gudang, Super Admin, Direktur, Manager, Akunting, Marketing, Viewer, Owner)
Permission Matrix Tab.Permission Grid: PASS - Shows 95 modules x 7 actions (view, create, edit, delete, approve, export, print)
Permission Matrix Tab.Category Grouping: PASS - Groups by Master Data, Pembelian, Penjualan, etc.

Assign Role Tab.User List: PASS - Shows users with current role badges
Assign Role Tab.Branch Access: PASS - Checkbox for all branches or specific

Audit Log Tab.Columns: PASS - Waktu, User, Aksi, Modul, Deskripsi, IP

context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC system fully functional. Backend: 18 tests covering all endpoints. Frontend: Permission Matrix shows 95 modules x 7 actions grid with role selection. Assign Role tab shows user list with role assignment. Audit Log tab shows activity history. Two bugs were fixed: 1) Backend user_id key mismatch in JWT, 2) Frontend users array format handling.
